Not a recall/discontinuation -- future stock confirmed unaffected; action is inspect-and-replace for the affected lot.

suppliers.note: Specimen-collection and laboratory company, NOT a vascular access player — no IV cannula found anywhere in the current published catalogue (verified against the live site 20/07/2026, with the caveat that the site is mid-migration and some legacy pages are unreachable, so 'none found' rather than a flat denial). Four business areas: Preanalytics, Life Science, Laboratory automation, Sample transport. S-Monovette's differentiator is that the same device supports EITHER aspiration (gentler, adjusts to vein condition) OR a fresh user-generated vacuum — not a factory pre-set vacuum that decays.

voice.line: Aspiration technique reduces haemolysis and repeat draws — lead with patient experience and sample quality, not price.

suppliers._specialitiesEvidence: 20/07/2026: added Urine Monovette -- confirmed on NHS Supply Chain (1 direct hit, Urine Collection Tube with Boric Acid Monovette 8.5ml) though narrower there than Sarstedt's own site range. Checked and confirmed molecular/PCR swabs and CryoPure cryogenic storage are genuine Sarstedt products but company-site-only -- zero NHS Supply Chain results for either, correctly not added as NHS-procured. One academic study (J Clin Microbiology 2020, COVID-era) found Sarstedt dry swabs in saline achieved lower SARS-CoV-2 RT-PCR detection than a CDC-recipe VTM -- a single study caveat, not a recall, noted for completeness only. Recorded the Universal Blood Culture Adapter field safety notice in alerts[].

suppliers.name: Terumo Aortic

alerts.text: Voluntary global recall of RelayPro Thoracic Stent-Graft System announced 01/07/2026 (NBS models 32-46mm, ~7,000 units sold May 2024-March 2026 across 43 countries). Reports of the delivery system failing to separate from the deployed graft, associated with three deaths. Shipments outside Japan suspended since March 2026.

suppliers.note: Terumo's aortic stent-graft division, formed from the 2018 merger of Vascutek and Bolton Medical; UK manufacturing base in Glasgow. Kept as a separate supplier record from Terumo UK (interventional/vascular access) and Terumo BCT (apheresis) as it is a distinct manufacturing and commercial entity.

voice.line: TEVAR stent-graft supplier -- RelayPro under an active global recall as of July 2026, worth knowing before referencing it in a meeting.
